# Gitesh Sarvaiya

> Fullstack Engineer · System Thinker · Solution Engineer. Real-time software, collaborative editors, local-first systems, Gen AI products, CRMs.

This site is a developer portfolio. Key pages for agents/LLMs to read:

- [Resume](https://giteshsarvaiya.com/resume.md): Full work experience, projects, and technical skills in plain markdown.
- [Portfolio](https://giteshsarvaiya.com/): Full site — testimonials, experience, projects, skills, bookshelf.
- [Blog](https://giteshsarvaiya.com/blogs): Writing on system design and fullstack engineering.
